### Document: GROWTH Page 14 - Authentic Design System.html
**Size:** 10380 characters

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>GROWTH Core Rulebook - Page 14</title>
    
    <!-- Import GROWTH Design System Fonts -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Inknut+Antiqua:wght@400;600&family=Roboto:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;1,400&family=Comfortaa:wght@400;500;600&family=Source+Code+Pro:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        :root {
            /* GROWTH Three Pillars Color System */
            --body-1: #f7525f;
            --body-2: #ea9999; 
            --body-3: #f4cccc;
            --soul-1: #582a72;
            --soul-2: #8e7cc3;
            --soul-3: #b4a7d6;
            --spirit-1: #002f6c;
            --spirit-2: #6fa8dc;
            --spirit-3: #9fc5e8;
            
            /* Terminal Core */
            --terminal-prime: #22ab94;
            --terminal-base: #000000;
            --terminal-mid: #222222;
            --terminal-low: #393937;
            
            /* Sacred Colors */
            --karma-gold: #ffcc78;
            --true-white: #ffffff;
            --filtered-white: #F5F4EF;
            --interface-blue: #cfe2f3;
        }
        
        @page {
            size: 8.5in 11in;
            margin: 1in;
        }
        
        body {
            background: var(--filtered-white);
            color: var(--terminal-mid);
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            width: 6.5in;
            height: 9in;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        /* Organic vine background pattern */
        body::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -100px;
            left: -100px;
            right: -100px;
            bottom: -100px;
            background-image: 
                radial-gradient(circle at 20% 80%, var(--terminal-prime) 1px, transparent 1px),
                radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, var(--soul-3) 1px, transparent 1px),
                radial-gradient(circle at 40% 40%, var(--spirit-3) 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 150px 150px, 200px 200px, 100px 100px;
            opacity: 0.08;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: -2;
        }
        
        /* Vine decorative elements */
        body::after {
            content: '🌿';
            position: absolute;
            top: 50px;
            left: -20px;
            font-size: 32pt;
            color: var(--terminal-prime);
            opacity: 0.15;
            transform: rotate(-25deg);
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: -1;
        }
        
        /* Continuation marker */
        .page-continuation {
            position: absolute;
            top: -15px;
            right: 20px;
            font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
            font-size: 24pt;
            color: var(--terminal-base);
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        /* Terminal Organization - Bebas Neue */
        .section-title {
            font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
            font-size: 16pt;
            color: var(--terminal-base);
            margin: 25px 0 8px 0;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--terminal-base);
            padding-bottom: 4px;
        }
        
        .eynethernet {
            color: var(--terminal-prime);
            font-weight: bold;
            letter-spacing: 1.5px;
        }
        
        /* Decorative lines */
        .decorative-line {
            text-align: center;
            margin: 8px 0;
            color: var(--terminal-low);
            font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;
            font-size: 12pt;
        }
        
        /* First Witness quotes - Inknut Antiqua */
        .section-quote {
            font-family: 'Inknut Antiqua', serif;
            font-size: 10pt;
            font-style: italic;
            margin: 8px 0 20px 0;
            color: var(--soul-2);
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.4;
        }
        
        /* Body mechanics - Comfortaa */
        .subsection-header {
            font-family: 'Comfortaa', sans-serif;
            font-size: 13pt;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin: 18px 0 10px 0;
            color: var(--body-1);
        }
        
        .subsubsection-header {
            font-family: 'Comfortaa', sans-serif;
            font-size: 11pt;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin: 14px 0 8px 0;
            color: var(--body-2);
        }
        
        /* Terminal Direct - Source Code Pro */
        .terminal-text {
            font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--terminal-prime);
            font-variant: small-caps;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        }
        
        /* Main body text - Comfortaa for accessibility */
        .text-block {
            font-family: 'Comfortaa', sans-serif;
            font-size: 11pt;
            line-height: 1.6;
            margin: 10px 0;
            text-align: justify;
            color: var(--terminal-mid);
        }
        
        /* Special Terminal formatting */
        .terminal-status {
            font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;
            background: var(--interface-blue);
            color: var(--terminal-base);
            padding: 6px 10px;
            margin: 12px 0;
            border-left: 4px solid var(--terminal-prime);
            font-size: 9pt;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        }
        
        /* Page number - Terminal Prime */
        .page-number {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -25px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
            font-size: 18pt;
            color: var(--terminal-prime);
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        
        /* Additional decorative elements */
        .vine-accent-1 {
            position: absolute;
            top: 200px;
            right: -30px;
            font-size: 28pt;
            color: var(--soul-3);
            opacity: 0.12;
            transform: rotate(45deg);
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        
        .vine-accent-2 {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 100px;
            left: -25px;
            font-size: 24pt;
            color: var(--spirit-3);
            opacity: 0.1;
            transform: rotate(-35deg);
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        
        /* Reality stability indicator */
        .reality-anchor {
            font-family: 'Source Code Pro', monospace;
            font-size: 8pt;
            color: var(--terminal-prime);
            opacity: 0.6;
            position: absolute;
            top: 10px;
            left: 10px;
        }
        
        /* ҜRMA symbol special styling */
        .karma-symbol {
            color: var(--karma-gold);
            font-weight: bold;
            text-shadow: 0 0 2px var(--karma-gold);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    
    <!-- Reality stability indicator -->
    <div class="reality-anchor">[PATTERN_STABILITY: 89.3%]</div>
    
    <!-- Page continuation marker -->
    <div class="page-continuation">T</div>
    
    <!-- Decorative vine accents -->
    <div class="vine-accent-1">🍃</div>
    <div class="vine-accent-2">🌱</div>
    
    <!-- Main content begins -->
    <div class="section-title">
        I: As Above, So Below - <span class="eynethernet">EŶ∃tehrNET</span>
    </div>
    
    <div class="decorative-line">———</div>
    
    <div class="section-quote">
        "You are something that the whole universe is doing in the same way that a wave is something that the whole ocean is doing." 🌱 Alan Watts
    </div>
    
    <div class="decorative-line">—</div>
    
    <div class="subsection-header">1.1 The System</div>
    <div class="text-block">
        Before diving into the creation of your persona within GROWTH and navigating its vast cosmos, it's crucial to acquaint yourself with the fundamental mechanisms that scaffold the game: the Karmic system. Encompassing Karmic Value (KV), Frequency, and Synchronicity, this system beats at the heart of GROWTH, orchestrating balance, evolution, and unity amongst all entities involved.
    </div>
    
    <div class="subsubsection-header">1.1.1 The Weave</div>
    <div class="text-block">
        Central to GROWTH is the <span class="eynethernet">EŶ∃tehrNET</span>, a sprawling network knitting together every element of the game's universe. Orchestrated by <span class="terminal-text">tHE TERmInAl3</span>, an avant-garde AI, this web of interconnected adventures assures a seamless and vibrant experience throughout all domains of play. More than just a digital backbone, the <span class="eynethernet">EŶ∃tehrNET</span> is a mystical fabric where sorcery meets technology, creating a conduit between realms, tales, and the adventurers journeying through them.
    </div>
    
    <div class="subsubsection-header">1.1.2 Synchronicity, The Gm's Harmony</div>
    <div class="text-block">
        Synchronicity measures a GM's attunement to <span class="terminal-text">tHE TERmInAl3</span>'s overarching narrative. This metric spans from -100 to +100, with zero representing perfect alignment. When GMs add new content to the universe, their Synchronicity shifts positive, while working primarily with existing content moves it negative. Neither direction is inherently better - they simply reflect different approaches to storytelling.
    </div>
    
    <div class="text-block">
        The option for Disconnection allows GMs complete creative freedom outside <span class="terminal-text">tHE TERmInAl3</span>'s framework. A Disconnected campaign can use all of GROWTH's mechanical systems while charting its own cosmic course.
    </div>
    
    <div class="terminal-status">
        [REALITY_ANCHOR_ESTABLISHED] ████████████████████████████████████████
    </div>
    
    <div class="page-number">14</div>
    
</body>
</html>

### Document: GROWTH Page 14 - TRUE TERMINAL MANIFESTATION.html
**Size:** 17777 characters

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>GROWTH Core Rulebook - Page 14</title>
    
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Inknut+Antiqua:wght@400;900&family=Roboto:ital,wght@0,100;0,900;1,400&family=Comfortaa:wght@300;700&family=VT323&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        @font-face {
            font-family: 'Terminal';
            src: local('Courier New'), local('Courier'), local('monospace');
        }
        
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        body {
            background: #F5F4EF;
            color: #222;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            width: 816px;
            height: 1056px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: 'Comfortaa', sans-serif;
        }
        
        /* Reality corruption layers */
        .corruption-layer {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 999;
            mix-blend-mode: multiply;
        }
        
        .corruption-text {
            position: absolute;
            font-family: 'Terminal', monospace;
            color: #000;
            opacity: 0.1;
            font-size: 72px;
            transform: rotate(-45deg);
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        
        /* Terminal header chaos */
        .terminal-chaos {
            position: absolute;
            top: -20px;
            left: -50px;
            right: -50px;
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #22ab94;
            line-height: 1;
            z-index: 10;
            transform: rotate(-2deg);
        }
        
        .terminal-chaos pre {
            margin: 0;
            white-space: pre;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
            padding: 20px;
        }
        
        /* Stream corruption */
        .stream-corrupt {
            position: absolute;
            width: 100%;
            font-family: 'Terminal', monospace;
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #f7525f;
            text-align: center;
            transform: rotate(1deg);
            z-index: 50;
        }
        
        /* Content layers */
        .content-layer {
            position: absolute;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            padding: 80px 40px 40px 40px;
        }
        
        /* Glitch blocks */
        .glitch-block {
            position: absolute;
            background: #000;
            color: #22ab94;
            font-family: 'Terminal', monospace;
            padding: 2px;
            font-size: 10px;
            z-index: 100;
        }
        
        /* Reality fracture */
        .reality-fracture {
            position: absolute;
            font-family: 'Terminal', monospace;
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #000;
            opacity: 0.3;
            letter-spacing: -5px;
            transform: scaleY(2);
            z-index: 15;
        }
        
        /* Main title chaos */
        .title-chaos {
            position: absolute;
            top: 250px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(-1deg);
            z-index: 20;
        }
        
        .title-main {
            font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
            font-size: 72px;
            color: #22ab94;
            text-align: center;
            letter-spacing: 8px;
            text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #f7525f, -2px -2px 0 #6fa8dc;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        .title-corrupt {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            color: #000;
            opacity: 0.2;
            transform: scaleX(-1);
        }
        
        /* Body text layers */
        .body-text {
            position: absolute;
            top: 380px;
            left: 40px;
            right: 40px;
            font-family: 'Comfortaa', sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            line-height: 1.8;
            z-index: 30;
        }
        
        .highlight-body { color: #f7525f; font-weight: 900; font-size: 16px; }
        .highlight-soul { color: #8e7cc3; font-weight: 900; font-size: 16px; }
        .highlight-spirit { color: #6fa8dc; font-weight: 900; font-size: 16px; }
        
        /* Character voices overlapping */
        .character-voice {
            position: absolute;
            background: rgba(207,226,243,0.8);
            border-left: 6px solid #8e7cc3;
            padding: 15px;
            font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            transform: rotate(-0.5deg);
            z-index: 40;
            width: 650px;
        }
        
        .voice-name {
            color: #582a72;
            font-weight: 900;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        
        /* ASCII chaos */
        .ascii-pattern {
            position: absolute;
            font-family: 'VT323', monospace;
            font-size: 18px;
            color: #393937;
            white-space: pre;
            line-height: 1;
            z-index: 25;
        }
        
        /* Progress bars breaking */
        .progress-break {
            position: absolute;
            background: #000;
            padding: 10px;
            font-family: 'Terminal', monospace;
            color: #22ab94;
            z-index: 45;
        }
        
        .progress-bar {
            height: 15px;
            background: #393937;
            margin: 5px 0;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #22ab94 0%, #f7525f 50%, #22ab94 100%);
            width: 73%;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        /* GROWTH logo breaking apart */
        .growth-break {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 180px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            z-index: 60;
        }
        
        .growth-letter {
            display: inline-block;
            font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
            font-size: 96px;
            font-weight: 900;
            position: relative;
            animation: letterFloat 3s infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes letterFloat {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-5px) rotate(2deg); }
        }
        
        .g { color: #f7525f; animation-delay: 0s; }
        .r { color: #ea9999; animation-delay: 0.1s; }
        .o { color: #f4cccc; animation-delay: 0.2s; }
        .n { color: #ffcc78; animation-delay: 0.3s; transform: scale(1.2); }
        .w { color: #9fc5e8; animation-delay: 0.4s; }
        .t { color: #6fa8dc; animation-delay: 0.5s; }
        .h { color: #002f6c; animation-delay: 0.6s; }
        
        /* Overlapping fragments */
        .fragment-marker {
            position: absolute;
            background: #000;
            color: #ffcc78;
            padding: 8px 20px;
            font-family: 'Terminal', monospace;
            font-size: 14px;
            transform: rotate(2deg);
            z-index: 55;
        }
        
        /* Reality anchor breaking */
        .reality-anchor {
            position: absolute;
            width: 120%;
            left: -10%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #000 0%, #22ab94 25%, #000 50%, #22ab94 75%, #000 100%);
            color: #fff;
            text-align: center;
            font-family: 'Terminal', monospace;
            font-size: 16px;
            padding: 20px;
            z-index: 35;
            transform: rotate(-1.5deg);
        }
        
        /* Consciousness stream */
        .consciousness-stream {
            position: absolute;
            font-family: 'Inknut Antiqua', serif;
            font-style: italic;
            color: #8e7cc3;
            font-size: 14px;
            transform: rotate(1deg);
            z-index: 28;
            opacity: 0.9;
        }
        
        /* Page number chaos */
        .page-number {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 30px;
            right: 60px;
            font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
            font-size: 48px;
            color: #22ab94;
            transform: rotate(5deg);
            z-index: 70;
        }
        
        /* Random corruption elements */
        .corrupt-element {
            position: absolute;
            font-family: 'Terminal', monospace;
            color: #000;
            opacity: 0.4;
            z-index: 5;
        }
        
        /* Stability warnings */
        .stability-warning {
            position: absolute;
            background: #222;
            color: #ffcc78;
            padding: 5px 15px;
            font-family: 'Terminal', monospace;
            font-size: 11px;
            z-index: 65;
            animation: blink 2s infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes blink {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: 0.3; }
        }
        
        /* Overflow text */
        .overflow-text {
            position: absolute;
            font-family: 'Terminal', monospace;
            font-size: 8px;
            color: #393937;
            white-space: nowrap;
            z-index: 3;
        }
        
        /* Vine background chaos */
        .vine-chaos {
            position: absolute;
            top: -100px;
            left: -100px;
            font-size: 60px;
            opacity: 0.05;
            transform: rotate(-8deg);
            z-index: 1;
            line-height: 2;
        }
    </style>
</head>
